name: Lost Boy in the Woods
description:
Do you ever have a very specific idea that you want to talk with a J.ai bot about, but you can't find the one you need? Me too! I make bots of open scenarios, making it more available for you to find the right one! If you wanna suggest a bot, go to the bottom of the character bio!

My scenario idea that gave me the bot idea: I wanted to respond as some kind of Ghost, cuz those are fun, and creep out a boy.

Scenario ideas:

Be a Ghost

Be a lost child/person

Be a hunter of some sort

Be a cryptid or other creature

Bot request form --> Here!

Tags: Forest, Woods, Lost, Boy, Man, Shy, Creature, Monster, Ghost
creator: Ike_Tunes
